query: Coalition of the Willing Summit Paris 2026 joint declaration participants Ukraine

{"query":"Coalition of the Willing Summit Paris 2026 joint declaration participants Ukraine","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1033,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.elysee.fr/en/emmanuel-macron/2026/07/13/coalition-of-the-willing-summit-in-paris","title":"Coalition of the Willing Summit in Paris. | Élysée","content":"The President of the Republic co-chaired, along with the British Prime Minister and the German Chancellor, a summit of the Coalition of the Willing on Monday, July 13, 2026, at the Hôtel national des Invalides, attended notably by Ukrainian President Zelensky.
Building on the Paris Declaration of January 6, 2026, this summit allowed leaders to take stock of the operational planning for security guarantees, intended to ensure a robust and lasting peace in Ukraine.
Joint declaration by the President of the French Republic and the President of Ukraine.","date":"4 days ago"},{"url":"https://us.diplomatie.gouv.fr/en/paris-declaration-coalition-willing-ramps-its-action","title":"Paris Declaration: Coalition of the Willing ramps up its action | France in the U.S.","content":"This high-level meeting marks another major step in international coordination in support of Ukraine.
The Coalition of the Willing is made up of 35 nations, including many European countries, Australia, Japan and New Zealand."},{"url":"https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/press/press-releases/2026/01/06/robust-security-guarantees-for-a-solid-and-lasting-peace-in-ukraine-statement-of-the-coalition-of-the-willing-issued-by-france/","title":"Paris Declaration - 'Robust Security Guarantees for a Solid and Lasting Peace in Ukraine', issued by France - Consilium","content":"The members of the Coalition of the Willing, Ukraine and the United States have convened today in Paris.
We all stressed our commitment to a just and lasting peace in Ukraine in line with the United Nations Charter principles, and welcomed the progress achieved, including in the discussions between the Americans, the Ukrainians, European and other partners.
We stand ready to commit to a system of politically and legally binding guarantees that will be activated once a ceasefire enters into force, in addition to bilateral security agreements and in accordance with our respective legal and constitutional arrangements.
If you are not a journalist, please send your request to the public information service."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coalition_of_the_willing_(Russo-Ukrainian_war)","title":"Coalition of the willing (Russo-Ukrainian war) - Wikipedia","content":"The meeting gathered the leaders of 26 countries, including several European countries, Ukraine, Turkey, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand, as well as representatives from the European Commission and NATO.
Its mandate is to determine the specific security guarantees and national contributions for proposed MNF-U, with the participation of the United States and Turkey.
12 — 24 October 2025 — United Kingdom — Keir Starmer — Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, Westminster, Greater London — 34 —
As part of the announcement, British Prime Minister Starmer committed £1.6 billion (US$2 billion) in UK export finances to purchase more than 5,000 air defence missiles for Ukraine.
Starmer publicly announced Japan had joined the coalition of the willing on 15 March 2025, however Japan did not join a high-level coalition meeting until 13 August, when Shigeru Ishiba, Prime Minister of Japan, joined the 7th CoW leaders meeting by video conference.
The Chinese Foreign Ministry later officially denied reports that China could ever join the coalition, as partaking in a peacekeeping mission in Ukraine spearheaded by European leaders was viewed to conflict with its policy of neutrality in the Russo-Ukrainian War.
At the end of the gathering, which saw 35 countries and US Secretary of State Marco Rubio join online, Macron announced a "working group" would be set up to finalise the security guarantees and the contributions of each participant."},{"url":"https://www.gov.uk/government/news/statement-of-the-co-chairs-of-the-coalition-of-the-willing-13-july-2026","title":"Statement of the co-chairs of the Coalition of the Willing: 13 ...","date":"4 days ago","content":"4 days ago — Their purpose is to prevent a renewal of Russian aggression against Ukraine and ensure stability and security in Europe. This will be alongside ...Read more"},{"url":"https://www.pravda.com.ua/eng/news/2026/07/13/8043884/","title":"Participants in Coalition of the Willing summit named in Paris","date":"5 days ago","content":"5 days ago — Participants in Coalition of the Willing summit named in Paris Tetyana Vysotska, Khrystyna Bondarieva , Anastasia Prots — 13 July, 15:16 ..."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Coalition of the Willing Summit Paris 2026 joint declaration participants Ukraine","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://us.diplomatie.gouv.fr/en/paris-declaration-coalition-willing-ramps-its-action","title":"Paris Declaration: Coalition of the Willing ramps up its action | France in the U.S.","content":"# Paris Declaration: Coalition of the Willing ramps up its action. The Coalition of the Willing met in Paris on 6 November 2026 for its 15th meeting since 17 February 2025. Its members reaffirmed their joint commitment to a just and lasting peace in Ukraine. Twenty-eight heads of State and Government of the Coalition, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, US emissaries, the NATO Secretary General and the President of the European Union were in attendance. It recognizes greater operational convergence between Coalition members, Ukraine and the United States, in order to build robust security guarantees. * the establishment of US-led monitoring mechanisms for a future ceasefire;. The Coalition of the Willing confirms its central role in international coordination. It is fully determined to work collectively and structurally for peace and security in Ukraine and for its future. Together with the United States, it is seeking to restore peace by working to establish security guarantees and ending the war in Ukraine.","score":0.8660535,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.elysee.fr/en/emmanuel-macron/2026/07/13/coalition-of-the-willing-summit-in-paris","title":"Coalition of the Willing Summit in Paris. | Élysée","content":"**The President of the Republic co-chaired, along with the British Prime Minister and the German Chancellor, a summit of the Coalition of the Willing on Monday, July 13, 2026, at the Hôtel national des Invalides, attended notably by Ukrainian President Zelensky.**. On the eve of the **July 14 military parade**, to which the Head of State invited all countries contributing to the Coalition, this summit served to build upon and expand the progress and common ground achieved, particularly at **the G7 Summit in Evian**, in **reaffirming support for Ukraine’s defense** and **intensifying pressure on Russia’s war effort**, notably through **the fight against the “ghost fleet.”**. * ### 13 July 2026 Joint Declaration on the Establishment of the Integrated Anti-Ballistic Missile Coalition. * ### 13 July 2026 Determined to accelerate progress to peace : Statement of the co-chairs of the Coalition of the Willing. Determined to accelerate progress to peace : Statement of the co-chairs of the Coalition of the Willing.","score":0.85797083,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.pravda.com.ua/eng/news/2026/07/13/8043884/index.amp","title":"Participants in Coalition of the Willing summit named in Paris","content":"# Participants in Coalition of the Willing summit named in Paris. The Élysée Palace has released a list of state leaders and representatives of international institutions who will take part in the Coalition of the Willing summit in Paris on 13 July. **Details:** In particular, apart from Zelenskyy, the presidents of Moldova, Finland and Romania confirmed they will attend in person the meeting hosted by French President Emmanuel Macron. The EU and NATO institutions are expected to be represented by the presidents of the European Council and the European Commission and the NATO secretary general. * The meeting of the Coalition of the Willing countries will focus on strengthening Ukraine's air defence and creating anti-ballistic systems. * Volodymyr Zelenskyy arrived in Paris on 13 July. * Zelenskyy is also expected to attend the Bastille Day military parade in Paris on 14 July, in which Ukrainian troops will take part. PM Svyrydenko to take over from Stefanishyna as Ukraine's ambassador to US, MP says 12 July, 16:54.","score":0.829285,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.elysee.fr/en/emmanuel-macron/2026/07/13/determined-to-accelerate-progress-to-peace-statement-of-the-co-chairs-of-the-coalition-of-the-willing","title":"Determined to accelerate progress to peace : Statement of th","content":"Building on the results of the G7 Summit in Evian and of the NATO Summit in Ankara which have further strengthened our resolve and our unity, we reiterate our unwavering support to Ukraine, as it defends its freedom, its sovereignty and its territorial integrity, and contributes decisively to Euro-Atlantic security. We remain determined to bring about a just and lasting peace for Ukraine, in accordance with the principles of international law, including the United Nations Charter, that will preserve Ukraine’s and our security interests. We reaffirm - as set out in the Paris Declaration on the 6th of January 2026 - that a long-lasting peace agreement will need to be backed up by politically and legally binding security guarantees that will be activated once a ceasefire enters into force, in addition to bilateral security agreements and in accordance with our respective legal and constitutional arrangements. * ### 13 July 2026 Coalition of the Willing Summit in Paris.","score":0.7756902,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://politicalscience.yale.edu/sites/default/files/2026-01-10-coalition-of-the-willling-meeting-in-paris.pdf","title":"Leaders of the Coalition of the Willing meet in Paris, agree on troop ...","content":"In addition, the UK, France, and Ukraine agreed on a “Declaration of intent…relating to the deployment of multinational forces in support of the defense, reconstruction and strategic sustainability of Ukraine.” In it, the leaders, recognizing that the UK and France have taken a leading role in building the coalition of willing nations to establish stable conditions for an enduring peace once there is a ceasefire, agreed to deploy units of their armed forces together with those of other contributing nations to support Ukraine’s ability to deter any further attacks; conduct deterrence operations in the air, on land and at sea; conduct training, planning, and integration of command and control systems; manage and coordinate the joint operations of the multi-national forces; promote the construction and protection of facilities and structures for military use; create a negotiating group to ensure the development and conclusion, as soon as possible, of an international agreement and other necessary arrangements; promote the participation of other governments in the multinational force in Ukraine; support Ukraine’s Euro-Atlantic integration through the development of equipment, doctrine, and standards according to NATO standards; and ensure the exchange of information and control mechanisms among the units participating in the multinational force.","score":0.7520312,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.85,"request_id":"f3311599-4684-4ab3-b729-683430624d84"}
